headline: Federal Reserve cuts rates by 75bps in emergency Sunday session
body: The Fed slashed rates by 75 basis points to a range of 0-0.25% in a surprise Sunday move, citing 'catastrophic' credit market freezes.

headline: Minor revision to Ohio regional housing starts
body: Ohio housing starts were revised down by 0.2% for the month of February, slightly below initial estimates.

headline: Global pandemic declared as New Virus X spreads in 40 countries
body: The WHO has officially declared a global pandemic for Virus X, which has a 5% mortality rate and has spread to all major continents.

headline: Apple announces new color for iPhone 15 case
body: Apple added a 'Midnight Blue' option for its silicone case line today. No changes to hardware specs.

headline: Cyberattack shuts down US Eastern Seaboard power grid
body: A coordinated state-sponsored cyberattack has taken down the main power grid for the US East Coast, affecting 50 million people.

headline: Analyst reiterates 'Hold' on small-cap biotech firm
body: Stifel analyst maintained a hold rating on GenoTech, citing lack of near-term catalysts.

headline: Russia-Ukraine peace treaty signed; sanctions to be lifted
body: In a historic breakthrough, a comprehensive peace treaty has been signed. Global energy prices plummeted 15% on the news.

headline: Local bakery wins national croissant award
body: A small bakery in Vermont has won the prestigious Golden Croissant award for its sourdough lamination.

headline: JP Morgan CEO warns of 'Hurricane' hitting US economy
body: Jamie Dimon warned investors that quantitative tightening and the Ukraine war could lead to an economic 'hurricane'.

headline: Microsoft Office adds 5 new emojis for Excel
body: The latest Office 365 update includes a 'chart-up' and 'calculator' emoji for Excel users.

headline: China invades Taiwan; US carrier groups moved to region
body: Conflict has erupted in the Taiwan Strait as Chinese forces launched a massive amphibious assault. TSMC factories halted.

headline: New study shows coffee might improve morning productivity
body: Researchers at University of Coffee found that 2 cups of java can increase focus by 12%.

headline: Tesla recalls 2 million vehicles for steering software patch
body: The NHTSA announced Tesla must recall almost every car sold in the US to fix a critical Autopilot steering flaw.

headline: General Motors CEO to speak at local charity dinner
body: Mary Barra will be the keynote speaker at the Detroit Children's Fund annual gala next month.

headline: CPI prints 12.5% — Volcker-style rate hikes priced in
body: Inflation has spiraled out of control. The 10-year yield surged to 7% as markets price in 100bps hikes every meeting.

headline: McDonald's testing blueberry-filled McFlurry in Singapore
body: The limited-time offer will run for two weeks across all Singapore locations starting Monday.

headline: Bitcoin exchange Binance files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy
body: The world's largest crypto exchange has collapsed following a multi-billion dollar bank run and SEC asset freeze.

headline: Weather report: Mild spring expected for US Midwest
body: NOAA predicts average temperatures and normal precipitation for the corn belt through May.

headline: Amazon to shut down Alexa division after $10bn losses
body: In a major restructuring, Amazon is cutting 20,000 jobs and ending its voice assistant hardware business.

headline: Netflix adds 'Double Thumbs Up' rating for movies
body: The feature allows users to distinguish between movies they liked and movies they loved.

headline: Nuclear explosion reported in North Sea; seismic alerts high
body: An undersea nuclear detonation of unknown origin has been detected. UK and Norway have scrambled naval assets.

headline: Ford F-150 owners group to meet in Dallas this weekend
body: Thousands of truck enthusiasts are expected for the annual gathering and swap meet.

headline: Goldman Sachs net income drops 80% on massive trading loss
body: The bank disclosed a 'rogue trader' loss of $12 billion in its commodities division, wiping out quarterly profits.

headline: Target to offer free samples of new organic tea brand
body: The promotion starts Saturday at participating SuperTarget locations nationwide.

headline: Earthquake Magnitude 9.1 hits Tokyo; Nikkei futures crash
body: A catastrophic earthquake and tsunami have struck the heart of Japan. Early reports indicate massive destruction.

headline: Adobe Photoshop adds new 'Comic Book' filter
body: The AI-powered filter can turn any photo into a stylized graphic novel illustration with one click.

headline: OPEC+ fails to reach agreement; Saudi launches price war
body: After talks collapsed, Saudi Arabia announced it would flood the market with oil. Brent crude fell $10 in minutes.

headline: Starbucks introduces pumpkin spice latte early in Canada
body: Due to cooler weather, the fall favorite will hit Canadian stores two weeks ahead of schedule.

headline: Google loses landmark antitrust case; US court orders breakup
body: A federal judge has ruled that Google is an illegal monopoly and must divest its Chrome and Android divisions.

headline: Coca-Cola changes bottle cap design to stay attached
body: The move aims to improve recycling rates by ensuring caps aren't discarded separately from bottles.

headline: Intel reports $15bn quarterly loss; suspending dividend
body: In its worst quarter ever, Intel announced a complete dividend suspension and a 25% reduction in workforce.

headline: Verizon to sponsor city's annual 'Run for Fun' 5K
body: The telecommunications giant will provide branded t-shirts and water stations for all participants.

headline: Boeing 737 Max fleet grounded indefinitely after new fire risk
body: The FAA ordered all Max planes out of the sky after a wiring issue led to multiple electrical fires in-flight.

headline: Home Depot to host weekend workshop on birdhouse building
body: The free class is aimed at children ages 5-12 and provides all necessary materials.

headline: Visa and Mastercard reach $30bn settlement over swipe fees
body: The settlement ends two decades of litigation and will lower transaction fees for US merchants significantly.

headline: CVS Health updates pharmacy app with dark mode
body: The update also includes minor bug fixes and performance improvements for the prescription refill screen.

headline: SEC approves all Ethereum Spot ETFs for US trading
body: In a surprise reversal, the SEC cleared the way for ETH ETFs, triggering a 20% rally in crypto assets.

headline: Pepsico CEO to appear on Martha Stewart podcast
body: Ramon Laguarta will discuss leadership and consumer trends in the snack food industry.

headline: Nvidia CEO sells entire personal stake; market panics
body: Jensen Huang filed to sell $5bn in NVDA stock. Semiconductor names fell 8% in pre-market trading.

headline: FedEx driver wins 'Safe Driver of the Year' in Ohio
body: A 20-year veteran of the company was honored for 2 million miles of accident-free driving.

headline: US Dollar loses 'Reserve Currency' status in BRICS trade
body: Major emerging economies have officially pivoted to a basket of gold and digital currencies for oil settlement.

headline: Walmart testing drone delivery for ice cream in Arizona
body: The pilot program aims to deliver frozen treats in under 10 minutes before they melt.

headline: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink: 'The 60/40 Portfolio is Dead'
body: Fink warned that structural inflation requires a total rethink of asset allocation for all pension funds.

headline: Salesforce Tower in San Francisco to host vertical run
body: The annual charity event raises money for local education programs.

headline: Oracle wins $40bn AI cloud contract with US Department of Defense
body: The massive project, titled 'Sentience Cloud', will move all DoD intelligence systems to Oracle's infrastructure.

headline: Disney+ to add 'Group Watch' feature back next month
body: The feature was previously removed for maintenance but is returning with improved sync capabilities.

headline: Berkshire Hathaway sells 50% of Apple stake; cash pile hits $250bn
body: Warren Buffett has dramatically reduced his largest holding, signaling a massive defensive pivot.

headline: Lowe's to sponsor community garden in North Carolina
body: The company will provide tools, seeds, and lumber for raised beds in the Charlotte suburbs.

headline: Meta announces 'Llama-4' with AGI-level reasoning capabilities
body: Mark Zuckerberg stated that the new model can solve complex engineering problems autonomously, sparking AI safety debates.

headline: UPS testing new electric cargo bikes in London
body: The pilot aims to reduce congestion and emissions in the city's ultra-low emission zone.
